characters.description: An Architect stranded beyond every working gate after escaping the fifth vault. Alone except for the independent mind inside his inner Citadel, Ruwen begins constructing the resources, control, and training he needs to survive and find a route home.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: An independent mind living within Ruwen's fortified inner Citadel. Separated from Ruwen by an earlier mental trap, he no longer shares every thought or feeling, but remains a practical strategist who helps Ruwen plan for survival in isolation.
characters.name: Overlord

characters.description: The senior voice among the Citadel narrators, formed from the manifesto of a former Mistwraith adversary. Restricted to language from that text, this narrator directs the others.
characters.name: Lead narrator

characters.description: Ruwen's soulbound intelligence companion. After he has spent about thirteen months stranded, her distant voice interrupts his sparring and gives him the first evidence that she has reached him.
characters.name: Rami

characters.description: Ruwen's partner and a Warden who joins the long search for him after the fifth-vault escape. She emerges with Rami from Shelley at Rainbow's End, ending Ruwen's physical isolation even though the group still faces a long journey home.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: An elder star tortoise who carries the rescue party across immense distances. Shelley narrows Ruwen's position by tracing the astronomical disturbances he caused, then reaches Rainbow's End through her command of space, wormholes, and size.
characters.name: Shelley

characters.description: Ruwen's step-fighting partner, reunited with him aboard Shelley after the rescue. His instinctive choice of a name for the nearby star gives Ruwen the clue that his months alone formed part of a closed time loop.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: An ally who survives the fifth-vault escape and returns with the rescue party. Lylan is also Dalyn's sister, and on reuniting with Ruwen she thanks him for freeing her brother while recognizing what his solitary choice cost him.
characters.name: Lylan

characters.description: A celestial remnant allied with Rami who returns with the rescue party aboard Shelley. His arrival with the others confirms that he survived the aftermath of the fifth vault.
characters.name: Xavier

characters.description: A limited duplicate assigned to Shelley's revival bath, with the complete Lear still located in Uru's third temple. It oversees progression and display information for Hamma and Lylan without relying on Uru's blessing.
characters.name: Lear

characters.description: A possible member of the coalition gathering against Ruwen Starfield while its members believe him dead.
characters.name: Izac

characters.description: An autonomous narrator created when research journals by a deceased goddess enter the mind of Ruwen. She proposes and tests a defensive formula shield to protect the Citadel and its inhabitants.
characters.name: Equation narrator

characters.description: A deity connected to Ruwen's Architect abilities and spiritual growth. Contacted through Uru's Touch, she explains that his twelve connected pathways carried him far beyond normal portal range and make him the sixth rune.
characters.name: Uru

characters.description: A small, fading divine sliver distinct from the main Uru. When the projection is about to die after delivering its warning, Ruwen, Rami, and Overlord attempt to preserve it inside Ruwen's mind, despite the danger its energy poses there.
characters.name: Uru's fragment

characters.description: An Ink Lord whose body and Emblem of Dominion remain hidden in Ruwen's inventory. Ruwen also possesses Numarrow's Scroll of the Faithful, which contains credentials for a private library but creates serious danger if used or exposed.
characters.name: Numarrow

characters.description: The sentient keeper of Shattered Sun and a protected ally of the returning group. Before granting Lylan full access to the dungeon, Ruwen requires her oath that she will neither harm Fractal nor knowingly allow anyone else to do so.
characters.name: Fractal

characters.description: An Eiru intelligence operative who intercepts the returning party at the Blood Gate after first concealing her identity. Kai has maintained watchers for Ruwen and briefs him on a northern revolt, criminal control of the tyrium mines, and a settlement network under strain.
characters.name: Kai

characters.description: A powerful Black Pyramid figure who arrives at the Blood Gate as Rami prepares for a major evolution. Her immediate purpose is to oversee that transformation while Ruwen and Sift remain nearby for the masters' trial.
characters.name: Miranda

characters.description: The familiar Black Pyramid guardian now confirmed to be the same person as Miranda. She directs Rami's evolution and investigates whether Xavier's altered energy can support a revival system independent of divine control, with Xavier treated as a willing participant.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: The mother of Sift and a Bamboo Viper Grandmaster. She is waiting with Padda in the Black Pyramid kitchen when Ruwen returns to find Sift.
characters.name: Madda

characters.description: The father of Sift and a Bamboo Viper Grandmaster. He waits beside Madda in the Black Pyramid kitchen when Ruwen arrives.
characters.name: Padda

characters.description: An infernal-aspect adversary who knows Ruwen survived and recognizes the strength hidden by his Scarecrow aspect. Bearing a Bamboo Viper clan mark that prevents his attack, she invokes Inferno's Embrace and sends him away for her father's investigation.
characters.name: Echo

characters.description: An infernal-aspect commander and Ruwen's hostile mother-in-law, waiting at the bind point where he is imprisoned. She explains that the realm cuts him off from his inventory, portal chalk, and most divine-linked options while a demon army surrounds him.
characters.name: Plague Siren

characters.description: A hostile aspect who joins the Plague Siren against Ruwen. Poison is one of three members of the group who appear highly trained in step fighting.
characters.name: Poison

characters.description: A hostile female aspect who joins the Plague Siren against Ruwen. Plague and Pestilence are siblings and take part in the group's attack after Ruwen offers to leave peacefully.
characters.name: Plague

characters.description: A hostile male aspect who joins the Plague Siren against Ruwen. Pestilence and Plague are siblings and take part in the group's attack after Ruwen offers to leave peacefully.
characters.name: Pestilence

characters.description: A hostile aspect who joins the Plague Siren against Ruwen. Drought is one of three members of the group who appear highly trained in step fighting.
characters.name: Drought

characters.description: A hostile aspect who joins the Plague Siren against Ruwen. War appears highly trained in step fighting and uses a weapon to free the Plague Siren from Ruwen's gravity restraint.
characters.name: War

characters.description: An Infernal god who arrives after Ruwen defeats the five aspects. He is the Plague Siren’s husband and Echo’s father, and he identifies Ruwen by surname.
characters.name: Echo's father

characters.description: A tactical adviser within the inner Citadel of Ruwen. This narrator coordinates its defense when an invading god attacks the mental city.
characters.name: Military narrator

characters.description: A deceased figure whose long plan was entrusted to Blapy, who has spent more than ten thousand years preserving it.
characters.name: Penn
